class Base {}

function mixin<T extends typeof Base>(base: T): T {
    return base;
}

declare function computed(): PropertyKey;
declare function callbackCall(): void;
declare function defaultCall(): number;
declare function direct(): void;
declare function fieldCall(): number;
declare function initializer(): number;
declare function localInit(): number;
declare function methodCall(): void;
declare function nestedMethodCall(): void;
declare function staticCall(): number;

class Child extends mixin(Base) {
    public field = fieldCall();
    public callback = (): void => callbackCall();
    public static staticField = staticCall();

    public method(): void {
        methodCall();
    }
}

function staticCycle(): void {
    class Cyclic {
        static {
            staticCycle();
        }
    }
    void Cyclic;
}

function objectCycle(): PropertyKey {
    const value = {
        [objectCycle()](): void {}
    };
    void value;
    return "cycle";
}

function objectComputedClassCycle(): PropertyKey {
    const value = {
        [String(class InnerComputed {
            static {
                objectComputedClassCycle();
            }
        })](): void {}
    };
    void value;
    return "cycle";
}

function recursiveTag(strings: TemplateStringsArray): string {
    void strings;
    return recursiveTag`again`;
}

const taggedResult = recursiveTag`start`;

class DerivedChild extends Child {}

const ChildAlias = Child;
class AliasedDerived extends ChildAlias {}

function makeUnknownBase(): new () => Base {
    return Base;
}

class FactoryDerived extends makeUnknownBase() {}

class AccessorLoop {
    public get value(): number {
        const { value } = this;
        return value;
    }

    public set value(next: number) {
        this.value = next;
        ({ value: this.value } = { value: next });
        [this.value] = [next];
        for (this.value of [next]) {
            break;
        }
    }
}

function recursiveDecorator<T extends Function>(
    value: T,
    context: ClassDecoratorContext
): void {
    @recursiveDecorator
    class Inner {}
    void value;
    void context;
    void Inner;
}

@recursiveDecorator
class DecoratedOuter {}

const typedDecorator: ClassDecorator = (value): void => {
    void value;
};

@typedDecorator
class TypedDecorated {}

function decoratorFactory(): ClassDecorator {
    return (): void => {};
}

@decoratorFactory()
class FactoryDecorated {}

const Expression = class extends mixin(Base) {
    public [computed()](): void {}
    public value = initializer();

    public nestedMethod(): void {
        nestedMethodCall();
    }
};

function owner(defaultValue = defaultCall()): number {
    class Local extends mixin(Base) {
        public value = localInit();
    }
    direct();
    return defaultValue + new Local().value;
}

const source = { a: 1, nested: { b: "sea" } };
const { a, nested: { b } } = source;

class Overloaded {
    public constructor(value: string);
    public constructor(value: number);
    public constructor(public readonly value: string | number) {}
}

const overloadInstance = new Overloaded(1);
const childInstance = new Child();
const derivedInstance = new DerivedChild();

export const edgeEvidence = {
    Child,
    AccessorLoop,
    AliasedDerived,
    DerivedChild,
    DecoratedOuter,
    Expression,
    FactoryDerived,
    a,
    b,
    childInstance,
    derivedInstance,
    overloadInstance,
    objectCycle,
    objectComputedClassCycle,
    owner,
    recursiveTag,
    taggedResult,
    staticCycle
};
